# Tori Coltman

Base URL: https://uthrofazeroth.github.io/tori-coltman/
Site type: public author website

Summary:
Tori Coltman writes emotionally grounded contemporary love stories shaped by timing, closeness, class, and change.

Primary pages:
- / : homepage and featured books
- /about/ : author bio and positioning
- /books/ : books index
- /books/slipstream/ : title page
- /books/the-man-in-plain-sight/ : title page
- /books/when-summer-ends/ : title page
- /books/before-winter/ : title page
- /books/thirty-minutes/ : title page
- /information/ : site information
- /privacy/ : privacy note

Books:
- Slipstream
- The Man in Plain Sight
- When Summer Ends
- Before Winter
- Thirty Minutes

Public contact:
- No public direct contact email is currently listed on the site.
